abilityDesc.Overgrow: At 1/3 or less of its max HP, this Pokemon's offensive stat is 1.5x with Grass attacks.
abilityDesc.Chlorophyll: If Sunny Day is active, this Pokemon's Speed is doubled.
abilityDesc.Blaze: At 1/3 or less of its max HP, this Pokemon's offensive stat is 1.5x with Fire attacks.
abilityDesc.Solar Power: If Sunny Day is active, this Pokemon's Sp. Atk is 1.5x; loses 1/8 max HP per turn.
abilityDesc.Torrent: At 1/3 or less of its max HP, this Pokemon's offensive stat is 1.5x with Water attacks.
abilityDesc.Rain Dish: If Rain Dance is active, this Pokemon heals 1/16 of its max HP each turn.
abilityDesc.Shield Dust: This Pokemon is not affected by the secondary effect of another Pokemon's attack.
abilityDesc.Shed Skin: This Pokemon has a 33% chance to have its status cured at the end of each turn.
abilityDesc.Compound Eyes: This Pokemon's moves have their accuracy multiplied by 1.3.
abilityDesc.Tinted Lens: This Pokemon's attacks that are not very effective on a target deal double damage.
abilityDesc.Swarm: At 1/3 or less of its max HP, this Pokemon's offensive stat is 1.5x with Bug attacks.
abilityDesc.Sniper: If this Pokemon strikes with a critical hit, the damage is multiplied by 1.5.
abilityDesc.Keen Eye: This Pokemon's accuracy can't be lowered by others; ignores their evasiveness stat.
abilityDesc.Tangled Feet: This Pokemon's evasiveness is doubled as long as it is confused.
abilityDesc.Big Pecks: Prevents other Pokemon from lowering this Pokemon's Defense stat stage.
abilityDesc.Guts: If this Pokemon is statused, its Attack is 1.5x; ignores burn halving physical damage.
abilityDesc.Hustle: This Pokemon's Attack is 1.5x and accuracy of its physical attacks is 0.8x.
abilityDesc.Intimidate: On switch-in, this Pokemon lowers the Attack of opponents by 1 stage.
abilityDesc.Unnerve: While this Pokemon is active, it prevents opposing Pokemon from using their Berries.
abilityDesc.Static: 30% chance a Pokemon making contact with this Pokemon will be paralyzed.
abilityDesc.Lightning Rod: This Pokemon draws Electric moves to itself to raise Sp. Atk by 1; Electric immunity.
abilityDesc.Sand Veil: If Sandstorm is active, this Pokemon's evasiveness is 1.25x; immunity to Sandstorm.
abilityDesc.Sand Rush: If Sandstorm is active, this Pokemon's Speed is doubled; immunity to Sandstorm.
abilityDesc.Poison Point: 30% chance a Pokemon making contact with this Pokemon will be poisoned.
abilityDesc.Rivalry: This Pokemon's attacks do 1.25x on same gender targets; 0.75x on opposite gender.
abilityDesc.Sheer Force: This Pokemon's attacks with secondary effects have 1.3x power; nullifies the effects.
abilityDesc.Cute Charm: 30% chance of infatuating Pokemon of the opposite gender if they make contact.
abilityDesc.Magic Guard: This Pokemon can only be damaged by direct attacks.
abilityDesc.Friend Guard: This Pokemon's allies receive 3/4 damage from other Pokemon's attacks.
abilityDesc.Unaware: This Pokemon ignores other Pokemon's stat stages when taking or doing damage.
abilityDesc.Flash Fire: This Pokemon's Fire attacks do 1.5x damage if hit by one Fire move; Fire immunity.
abilityDesc.Drought: On switch-in, this Pokemon summons Sunny Day.
abilityDesc.Competitive: This Pokemon's Sp. Atk is raised by 2 for each of its stats that is lowered by a foe.
abilityDesc.Frisk: On switch-in, this Pokemon identifies the held items of all opposing Pokemon.
abilityDesc.Inner Focus: This Pokemon cannot be made to flinch. Immune to Intimidate.
abilityDesc.Infiltrator: Moves ignore substitutes and foe's Reflect/Light Screen/Safeguard/Mist/Aurora Veil.
abilityDesc.Stench: This Pokemon's attacks without a chance to flinch gain a 10% chance to flinch.
abilityDesc.Effect Spore: 30% chance of poison/paralysis/sleep on others making contact with this Pokemon.
abilityDesc.Dry Skin: This Pokemon is healed 1/4 by Water, 1/8 by Rain; is hurt 1.25x by Fire, 1/8 by Sun.
abilityDesc.Damp: Prevents Explosion/Mind Blown/Misty Explosion/Self-Destruct/Aftermath while active.
abilityDesc.Wonder Skin: Status moves with accuracy checks are 50% accurate when used on this Pokemon.
abilityDesc.Arena Trap: Prevents opposing Pokemon from choosing to switch out unless they are airborne.
abilityDesc.Sand Force: This Pokemon's Ground/Rock/Steel attacks do 1.3x in Sandstorm; immunity to it.
abilityDesc.Pickup: If this Pokemon has no item, it finds one used by an adjacent Pokemon this turn.
abilityDesc.Technician: This Pokemon's moves of 60 power or less have 1.5x power, including Struggle.
abilityDesc.Limber: This Pokemon cannot be paralyzed. Gaining this Ability while paralyzed cures it.
abilityDesc.Cloud Nine: While this Pokemon is active, the effects of weather conditions are disabled.
abilityDesc.Swift Swim: If Rain Dance is active, this Pokemon's Speed is doubled.
abilityDesc.Vital Spirit: This Pokemon cannot fall asleep. Gaining this Ability while asleep cures it.
abilityDesc.Anger Point: If this Pokemon (not its substitute) takes a critical hit, its Attack is raised 12 stages.
abilityDesc.Defiant: This Pokemon's Attack is raised by 2 for each of its stats that is lowered by a foe.
abilityDesc.Justified: This Pokemon's Attack is raised by 1 stage after it is damaged by a Dark-type move.
abilityDesc.Water Absorb: This Pokemon heals 1/4 of its max HP when hit by Water moves; Water immunity.
abilityDesc.Synchronize: If another Pokemon burns/poisons/paralyzes this Pokemon, it also gets that status.
abilityDesc.No Guard: Every move used by or against this Pokemon will always hit.
abilityDesc.Steadfast: If this Pokemon flinches, its Speed is raised by 1 stage.
abilityDesc.Gluttony: This Pokemon eats Berries at 1/2 max HP or less instead of their usual 1/4 max HP.
abilityDesc.Clear Body: Prevents other Pokemon from lowering this Pokemon's stat stages.
abilityDesc.Liquid Ooze: This Pokemon damages those draining HP from it for as much as they would heal.
abilityDesc.Rock Head: This Pokemon does not take recoil damage besides Struggle/Life Orb/crash damage.
abilityDesc.Sturdy: If this Pokemon is at full HP, it survives one hit with at least 1 HP. Immune to OHKO.
abilityDesc.Flame Body: 30% chance a Pokemon making contact with this Pokemon will be burned.
abilityDesc.Oblivious: This Pokemon cannot be infatuated or taunted. Immune to Intimidate.
abilityDesc.Own Tempo: This Pokemon cannot be confused. Immune to Intimidate.
abilityDesc.Regenerator: This Pokemon restores 1/3 of its maximum HP, rounded down, when it switches out.
abilityDesc.Magnet Pull: Prevents opposing Steel-type Pokemon from choosing to switch out.
abilityDesc.Analytic: This Pokemon's attacks have 1.3x power if it is the last to move in a turn.
abilityDesc.Early Bird: This Pokemon's sleep counter drops by 2 instead of 1.
abilityDesc.Thick Fat: Fire-/Ice-type moves against this Pokemon deal damage with a halved offensive stat.
abilityDesc.Hydration: This Pokemon has its status cured at the end of each turn if Rain Dance is active.
abilityDesc.Ice Body: If Snow is active, this Pokemon heals 1/16 of its max HP each turn.
abilityDesc.Sticky Hold: This Pokemon cannot lose its held item due to another Pokemon's Ability or attack.
abilityDesc.Poison Touch: This Pokemon's contact moves have a 30% chance of poisoning.
abilityDesc.Shell Armor: This Pokemon cannot be struck by a critical hit.
abilityDesc.Skill Link: This Pokemon's multi-hit attacks always hit the maximum number of times.
abilityDesc.Overcoat: This Pokemon is immune to powder moves, Sandstorm damage, and Effect Spore.
abilityDesc.Levitate: This Pokemon is immune to Ground; Gravity/Ingrain/Smack Down/Iron Ball nullify it.
abilityDesc.Cursed Body: If this Pokemon is hit by an attack, there is a 30% chance that move gets disabled.
abilityDesc.Weak Armor: If a physical attack hits this Pokemon, Defense is lowered by 1, Speed is raised by 2.
abilityDesc.Insomnia: This Pokemon cannot fall asleep. Gaining this Ability while asleep cures it.
abilityDesc.Forewarn: On switch-in, this Pokemon is alerted to the foes' move with the highest power.
abilityDesc.Hyper Cutter: Prevents other Pokemon from lowering this Pokemon's Attack stat stage.
abilityDesc.Soundproof: This Pokemon is immune to sound-based moves, unless it used the move.
abilityDesc.Aftermath: If this Pokemon is KOed with a contact move, that move's user loses 1/4 its max HP.
abilityDesc.Harvest: If last item used is a Berry, 50% chance to restore it each end of turn. 100% in Sun.
abilityDesc.Battle Armor: This Pokemon cannot be struck by a critical hit.
abilityDesc.Reckless: This Pokemon's attacks with recoil or crash damage have 1.2x power; not Struggle.
abilityDesc.Unburden: Speed is doubled on held item loss; boost is lost if it switches, gets new item/Ability.
abilityDesc.Iron Fist: This Pokemon's punch-based attacks have 1.2x power. Sucker Punch is not boosted.
abilityDesc.Neutralizing Gas: While this Pokemon is active, Abilities have no effect.
abilityDesc.Natural Cure: This Pokemon has its non-volatile status condition cured when it switches out.
abilityDesc.Serene Grace: This Pokemon's moves have their secondary effect chance doubled.
abilityDesc.Healer: 30% chance this Pokemon's ally has its status cured at the end of each turn.
abilityDesc.Leaf Guard: If Sunny Day is active, this Pokemon cannot be statused and Rest will fail for it.
abilityDesc.Scrappy: Fighting, Normal moves hit Ghost. Immune to Intimidate.
abilityDesc.Water Veil: This Pokemon cannot be burned. Gaining this Ability while burned cures it.
abilityDesc.Illuminate: This Pokemon's accuracy can't be lowered by others; ignores their evasiveness stat.
abilityDesc.Filter: This Pokemon receives 3/4 damage from supereffective attacks.
abilityDesc.Mold Breaker: This Pokemon's moves and their effects ignore the Abilities of other Pokemon.
abilityDesc.Moxie: This Pokemon's Attack is raised by 1 stage if it attacks and KOes another Pokemon.
abilityDesc.Rattled: Speed is raised 1 stage if hit by a Bug-, Dark-, or Ghost-type attack, or Intimidated.
abilityDesc.Imposter: On switch-in, this Pokemon Transforms into the opposing Pokemon that is facing it.
abilityDesc.Adaptability: This Pokemon's same-type attack bonus (STAB) is 2 instead of 1.5.
abilityDesc.Anticipation: On switch-in, this Pokemon shudders if any foe has a supereffective or OHKO move.
abilityDesc.Volt Absorb: This Pokemon heals 1/4 of its max HP when hit by Electric moves; Electric immunity.
abilityDesc.Quick Feet: If this Pokemon is statused, its Speed is 1.5x; ignores Speed drop from paralysis.
abilityDesc.Trace: On switch-in, or when it can, this Pokemon copies a random adjacent foe's Ability.
abilityDesc.Download: On switch-in, Attack or Sp. Atk is raised 1 stage based on the foes' weaker Defense.
abilityDesc.Pressure: If this Pokemon is the target of a foe's move, that move loses one additional PP.
abilityDesc.Immunity: This Pokemon cannot be poisoned. Gaining this Ability while poisoned cures it.
abilityDesc.Snow Cloak: If Snow is active, this Pokemon's evasiveness is 1.25x.
abilityDesc.Marvel Scale: If this Pokemon has a non-volatile status condition, its Defense is multiplied by 1.5.
abilityDesc.Multiscale: If this Pokemon is at full HP, damage taken from attacks is halved.
